rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers — full picture, his people, no armour. That one goes to Matt, and it's not close. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. But the poncho? Still doing its job — brave choice, zero exposure. And the wetsuit moment with the swim group? Caught himself wanting to hide his toes. Named it, didn't fix it yet.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and invisible inside the routines he's stopped questioning.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
